overall.description: A static view from an elevated pedestrian walkway overlooking a busy futuristic city intersection in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The scene features modern glass architecture, a prominent building with '05' signage, palm trees, and continuous vehicle traffic moving through multi-level roadways under partly cloudy skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway overlooking futuristic multi-level highway intersection

agents.ego_description: standing still on an elevated walkway, watching the traffic flow below

entered.detail: tall futuristic building with large orange '05' signage on the facade
curved elevated roadway with vehicles traveling on multiple levels
modern glass and steel skyscraper with reflective windows
tall palm trees lining the left side of the view near the waterway
body of water running parallel to the street on the left side
metal and glass safety railing of the elevated walkway in the foreground
illuminated advertising signs attached to buildings on the right
concrete and steel bridge structure crossing over the road

segments.scene_description: A stationary view from an elevated pedestrian walkway overlooking a futuristic urban intersection. The scene features prominent modern architecture including a building with '05' signage, multi-level highways, and a canal, with moderate vehicle traffic continuously flowing through the intersection below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a stationary, elevated perspective overlooking a bustling futuristic urban intersection. It begins with a wide view from a pedestrian walkway, capturing the scale of modern glass architecture and a prominent building marked with '05' signage. As the gaze lingers, the focus settles on the complex infrastructure of multi-level highways and a parallel canal. The scene remains constant as moderate vehicle traffic flows continuously through the intersection below under a partly cloudy sky.
